title: T-005 — Implement SET-001 Wizard Launcher modal (auto-show for new orgs)
prompt:
Implement the entry point modal that auto-shows for new organizations.

PRD §14.4 SET-001: Wizard Launcher screen that:
- Auto-shows when an org is created (new onboarding_state detected)
- Can be triggered manually from settings
- Shows intro text and "Start Onboarding" button
- Can be dismissed (skip for now) — dismissal does NOT set skipped_steps, just closes modal
- After click, transitions to step 1 (Organization Profile screen, SET-002)

Acceptance:
- Modal component renders on app mount if org.onboarding_state.current_step == 1 and last_activity_at is null
- "Start Onboarding" button navigates to step 1 form
- "Skip for now" button closes modal (no state change; can re-trigger later)
- Modal is accessible (focus trapping, ARIA labels)

Test: E2E test creates new org and verifies launcher modal appears automatically.

pipeline_inputs.description: Wizard launcher modal that auto-shows for new organizations
pipeline_inputs.details: Create OnboardingLauncherModal component that: (1) Renders as a modal overlay at app root level. (2) Checks on mount: if org exists AND onboarding_state.current_step == 1 AND last_activity_at is null, automatically show modal. (3) Modal displays: title 'Get Started with <OrgName>', subtitle/intro text, two buttons: 'Start Onboarding' and 'Skip for now'. (4) 'Start Onboarding' button calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step {step_number: 1, data: {...}} or navigates to step 1 form (depends on wizard flow). (5) 'Skip for now' button simply closes modal without changing onboarding_state. (6) Modal can be manually triggered from Settings → Onboarding (if dismissed). (7) Use responsive design; works on mobile and desktop. (8) Implement focus trap and keyboard close (Esc key) for accessibility.
out_of_scope: app root layout integration (may be in Layout component)
acceptance_criteria: Given a new organization created, when user logs in, then launcher modal auto-shows with 'Get Started' text
Given launcher modal is open, when user clicks 'Start Onboarding', then modal closes and user navigates to step 1 (SET-002)
Given launcher modal is open, when user clicks 'Skip for now', then modal closes and onboarding_state is NOT modified (can be re-triggered later)
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_launcher_auto_shows_for_new_org() creates org via API and verifies modal visibility
Write e2e test: test_launcher_skip_for_now() clicks skip button and verifies modal closes without state change
Verify modal closes on Esc key press
risk_red_lines: Do not auto-show modal if onboarding is already in progress (current_step > 1)
Do not modify onboarding_state on skip action
